channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. measles cases exceed last year's total, tracker reports
item.description: This year's measles case count in the U.S. has surpassed last year's total, reaching 2,295—a level not seen in 35 years.

item.title: Hardline conservatives gain influence in Senate
item.description: Hardline conservatives are gaining power on key Senate committees, challenging GOP leadership.

item.title: Scoop: 'Regime Change' sells 500,000, on track for 2026 bestseller
item.description: The exposé on Trump's second term by Haberman and Swan has sold 500,000 copies, heading for nonfiction bestseller of 2026.

item.title: Trump and Rubio won't block Tate brothers' extradition to UK
item.description: President Trump and Secretary Rubio do not plan to stop the extradition of the Tate brothers to the UK.
